name: Ephesoft Intelligent Document Processing REST API
what_it_does: Ephesoft intelligent document processing REST API for enterprises to capture, classify, and extract data from unstructured documents — including invoices, forms, contracts, and ID documents — using machine learning-based classification, OCR, and data extraction — enabling automated document ingestion, intelligent data capture, workflow routing, and system integration through Ephesoft's cloud-native IDP platform. Enables AI agents to manage document submission for multi-format document upload and batch processing automation, handle document classification for ML-based document type identification automation, access data extraction for intelligent OCR and key-value field extraction automation, retrieve validation for extracted data quality check and review automation, manage export configuration for extracted data routing and export automation, handle workflow orchestration for document review and approval workflow automation, access supervised learning for document class training and model improvement automation, retrieve batch management for document processing batch tracking automation, manage exception handling for low-confidence extraction review automation, and integrate Ephesoft with ECM systems, ERP, and business applications for end-to-end document automation.
use_cases: Automating invoice data extraction and AP workflow for accounts payable automation agents
Capturing and classifying incoming mail and forms for document intake automation agents
Extracting structured data from contracts and agreements for contract management automation agents
Processing loan and mortgage document packages for financial services automation agents
not_for: Simple PDF text extraction (Ephesoft is intelligent document processing, not basic PDF parsing)
Real-time document streaming (Ephesoft is batch-oriented document processing, not real-time stream)
Image editing or document creation (Ephesoft is extraction and capture, not document creation platform)
best_when: An enterprise AP team, mailroom, HR department, or operations function wanting AI agents to automate document classification and data extraction for high-volume, mixed-document processing through Ephesoft's machine learning IDP platform.
avoid_when: DOCUMENT CLASS TRAINING REQUIRED: Ephesoft ML classification requires training samples per document class; automated zero-training assumption creates misclassification for document types without training data; automated must provide training samples for each document type. OCR ACCURACY VARIES BY DOCUMENT QUALITY: Scan resolution and document condition affect OCR accuracy; automated perfect-OCR assumption creates extraction_error for poor quality scans; automated must implement image quality validation before submission. EXCEPTION HANDLING REQUIRES HUMAN REVIEW: Low-confidence extractions require human validation; automated no-exceptions assumption creates data_quality_issue for batches skipping manual review; automated must implement exception routing for low-confidence documents. EXPORT CONFIGURATION IS REQUIRED: Extracted data routing requires export connector configuration; automated automatic-export assumption creates data_stuck_in_system without configured export targets; automated must configure export connectors for downstream systems.

auth.notes: Ephesoft uses OAuth2 for IDP REST API. REST API with JSON. Irvine, CA HQ. Founded 2007. Acquired by Lexmark International 2022. Products: Ephesoft Transact (on-prem/private cloud), Ephesoft Semantik (cloud IDP), Semantik for Invoices. Integrates with SharePoint, Salesforce, SAP, Oracle, DocuWare. Competes with Hyperscience, Kofax, and ABBYY for intelligent document processing.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Trial for qualified organizations; production requires Ephesoft/Lexmark subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription by document volume or pages processed; Transact and Semantik priced separately; enterprise custom pricing
pricing.notes: Irvine CA. Lexmark subsidiary. Annual subscription. Document processing. Enterprise IDP market.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth token; document processing throughput throttled per subscription plan

known_agent_gotchas: BATCH PROCESSING IS ASYNC: Document processing batches are asynchronous; automated synchronous-result assumption creates polling_required for batch completion status; automated must poll batch status until completion

DOCUMENT CLASS CONFIGURATION IS DEPLOYMENT-SPECIFIC: Document classes and extraction rules are configured per deployment; automated portable-configuration assumption creates class_not_found for classes defined in one environment but not another; automated must use environment-specific class names

IMAGE PRE-PROCESSING AFFECTS ACCURACY: Ephesoft benefits from image pre-processing (deskew, despeckle); automated raw-scan assumption creates lower_accuracy for unprocessed poor-quality scans; automated should use Ephesoft's image pre-processing options

EXTRACTION CONFIDENCE THRESHOLDS NEED TUNING: Default confidence thresholds may not match business requirements; automated default-threshold assumption creates wrong_exception_rate for workflows requiring higher or lower confidence; automated must tune thresholds for each document class

TRANSACT VS SEMANTIK HAVE DIFFERENT APIS: Ephesoft Transact and Semantik are different products with different APIs; automated unified assumption creates endpoint_confusion when mixing Transact and Semantik calls; automated must use correct product API
agent_readiness.security_notes: Document processing. SOC2, GDPR, HIPAA. OAuth2. US/EU. Document content and extracted business data.

security_score_components.security_notes: IDP platform. SOC2, HIPAA. OAuth2. US/EU. Document content and extracted data.
